title: Support dist and solve...before inside foreach constraints (#7245)
body:
## Summary
Support `dist` constraints and `solve...before` ordering hints inside `foreach` loops (IEEE 1800-2017 §18.5.8, §18.5.9). Also support `solve...before` with struct array member paths (e.g., `solve x before cfg[i].w`) for both packed and unpacked structs.

## Issue
Fixes verilator/verilator#7245

## Changes
- `src/V3Randomize.cpp`: Add `lowerDistConstraints()` recursion into `AstConstraintForeach` nodes so `dist` weight variables are found in foreach scope
- `src/V3Randomize.cpp`: Add `buildSolveBeforeNameExpr()` to generate dynamic SMT variable names for solve-before expressions, replacing the static `extractSolveBeforeVarName()`
- `src/V3Randomize.cpp`: Add `getSelNameAndFromp()` helper to handle both `AstMemberSel` and `AstStructSel` (post-V3Width) uniformly
- `src/V3Randomize.cpp`: Add `buildArraySelNameExpr()` helper for `baseName[idx]` dynamic name generation
- `src/V3Randomize.cpp`: Handle packed struct members (`AstSel` on `AstArraySel`) by promoting to array element level
- `src/verilog.y`: Remove CONSTRAINTIGN warning for `solve...before` inside `constraint_expressionList`, emit `AstConstraintBefore` instead

## Test
- Added `test_regress/t/t_randomize_dist_foreach.{v,py}` -- dist with dynamic weights inside foreach
- Added `test_regress/t/t_randomize_solve_before_foreach.{v,py}` -- solve...before inside foreach with simple arrays, unpacked struct members, packed struct members, and static array index
- Removed `test_regress/t/t_constraint_solve_before_unsup.{v,py,out}` -- patterns now supported
- Removed `test_regress/t/t_constraint_solve_before_expr_unsup.{v,py,out}` -- patterns now supported

---
Developed by PlanV GmbH, assisted with Claude Code.

Reviewed by YilouWang.
